summary: Latency-sensitive validation of Tsvetelina portfolio. Backend endpoints healthy. Frontend renders all sections and most flows work (nav, project dialogs open/close via ESC and close btn, external links, mobile menu toggle, copy-email toast, contact socials). Two blockers found: project card cover images render with empty src (data/prop mismatch: data uses `cover`, component uses `p.image`), and skills marquee data-testids are missing from DOM (react-fast-marquee does not forward `data-testid` prop — marquees do animate visually).
passed: main-nav present with logo and 4 links + Let's Talk CTA
Project dialog opens, shows external link (verified href to ArtStation, e.g. https://www.artstation.com/artwork/Ov22VK)
Dialog closes via ESC and via project-dialog-close button
copy-email-btn triggers sonner toast 'Email copied to clipboard'
Mobile (375x812): nav-menu-toggle opens mobile-menu with all 4 nav links
Hero collage background and avatar image load (naturalWidth > 0)

failed.issue: All 4 project card elements have empty src (naturalWidth=0). Projects.jsx line 47 uses `p.image` but data/portfolio.js defines the field as `cover`. Alt text is set correctly but no image ever loads.
failed.evidence: page.evaluate over img tags returned 4 broken images with src='' and alts: Blood Moon Kai'sa, Tarot Cards design, Traditional Art — James McAvoy, Anime / Manga Art. grep confirms data uses `cover:` and Projects.jsx uses `src={p.image}`.

failed.issue: data-testid='skills-marquee-1' and 'skills-marquee-2' not present in DOM. react-fast-marquee's <Marquee> does not forward arbitrary data-testid to the rendered wrapper (rendered elements use classes rfm-marquee-container/rfm-marquee). Marquees themselves render and animate correctly.
failed.evidence: query_selector returned null for both testids; querySelectorAll('.rfm-marquee-container') returned 2 elements; screenshot shows CHARACTER DESIGN / SKIN CONCEPT scrolling.

action_items: Fix Projects.jsx line 47: change `src={p.image}` to `src={p.cover}` (or add `image` field to data). Without this fix, no project cover images are shown.

Add data-testid to a wrapper div around each , e.g.
, since react-fast-marquee does not pass through the prop.
